items.title: Man arrested after allegedly setting another on fire in Warrawong unit

items.summary: Gout Gout is set to take part in the 200m and 4x400m relay at the Under-20 World Athletics Championships in August.

items.title: Coach Michael Voss resigns from AFL strugglers Carlton, Mick Malthouse says premiership winning player will be relieved
items.summary: Michael Voss has left Carlton, resigning with immediate effect following a run of seven consecutive AFL defeats, with another former Carlton boss Mick Malthouse saying the Brisbane premiership-winning player will be relieved to be out of the hot seat.

items.title: Bullsbrook Centre for National Resilience to be used to quarantine passengers from hantavirus ship
items.summary: Nestled away in Perth's outer fringes this 500-bed facility was built during the COVID-19 pandemic as a quarantine centre, but sat idle for years. Now, a different deadly virus will see it used for its intended purpose.

items.title: More than 70 UK Labour MPs call for Sir Keir Starmer's resignation — as it happened

items.summary: Regional families are anxiously waiting to see the impact of recently announced changes to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), especially for those with autism.

items.title: Alexei Popyrin brushed aside by world number one Jannik Sinner at Italian Open
items.summary: Alexei Popyrin has been outclassed in Rome, beaten 6-2 6-0 by world number one Jannik Sinner in 65 one-sided minutes in the Italian Open third round.

items.title: Wife murderer Colin Arthur Case issued five-year parole period for sexual abuse of child

items.title: Homes Tasmania might come and go before Felicity gets a rental

items.title: First Nations man dies in custody at Lotus Glen Correctional Centre in Far North Queensland

items.summary: A farmer in Western Australia's Great Southern region has lost about $100,000 after someone stole hundreds of his pregnant sheep.

items.summary: Woodside-commissioned modelling suggests WA is not on track to reach net zero by 2050, even if its massive Browse gas project proceeds, unless renewable energy is rolled out at unprecedented speed.
